title: [PyCDE] Segmentation Fault During Constant Struct Initialization in PyCDE

features.name: packed struct type definition with multi-width bit fields
features.description: Code should include a packed struct type definition with named fields of different bit widths
features.snippet: typedef struct packed { logic [3:0] a; logic [31:0] b; } RecordTy;

features.name: struct constant initialization with named field initializers
features.description: Code should include a struct variable initialized using named field initializers with literal values
